89 H3A H3A_TOLIET_PLAN 24a(H3a)Any Scheduled Toileting Plan CHAR 1 A plan whereby staff members at scheduled times each day either take the patient to the toilet room, or give the patient a urinal, or remind the patient to go to the toilet. Includes habit training and/or prompted voiding. 0 =
